setting.note: The Martian invasion mapped across real Surrey and London in strict order: the first cylinder lands on Horsell Common at Woking, the tripods burn Weybridge and Shepperton, and the last of them dies on Primrose Hill. Woking marks the spot with a tripod of its own, and it brings H. G. Wells into the atlas.
